name: National Scholarship Portal (NSP)
description: Centralized platform for students to apply for scholarships offered by central and state governments.

name: Pradhan Mantri Vidyalakshmi Scheme
description: Provides students with access to education loans through a single window platform.

name: Mid-Day Meal Scheme (PM Poshan)
description: Provides free nutritious meals to school children to improve enrollment, retention, and attendance.

name: Samagra Shiksha Abhiyan
description: Integrated scheme for school education covering pre-school to class 12, focusing on quality and equity.

name: PM eVIDYA
description: Digital education initiative providing multi-mode access to online learning resources for students.

name: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship Scheme (NMMSS)
description: Scholarship support for meritorious students from economically weaker sections to reduce dropouts.

name: National Overseas Scholarship
description: Financial assistance to students from marginalized communities to pursue higher studies abroad.

name: Rashtriya Uchchatar Shiksha Abhiyan (RUSA)
description: Centrally sponsored scheme to improve access, equity, and quality in state higher education institutions.

name: SWAYAM
description: Free online courses for students and teachers across India, covering school, college, and professional learning.

name: GIAN (Global Initiative of Academic Networks)
description: Brings international faculty to Indian institutions to enhance academic collaboration and research.

name: IMPRINT
description: Research initiative to address major engineering and science challenges in India.

name: Unnat Bharat Abhiyan
description: Connects higher education institutions with rural communities to address development challenges.

name: National Digital Library of India (NDLI)
description: Provides free access to millions of digital learning resources for students and researchers.

name: AICTE Pragati Scholarship for Girls
description: Scholarship scheme for girl students pursuing technical education.

name: AICTE Saksham Scholarship
description: Scholarship for differently-abled students pursuing technical education.

name: National Programme on Technology Enhanced Learning (NPTEL)
description: Online courses and certification in engineering, science, and humanities by IITs and IISc.

name: INSPIRE Scholarship
description: Scholarship for students pursuing science education and research.

name: Ishan Uday Scholarship
description: Special scholarship scheme for students from the North Eastern Region.

name: National Fellowship for SC Students
description: Fellowship for Scheduled Caste students pursuing higher education.

name: National Fellowship for OBC Students
description: Fellowship scheme to support higher education for students belonging to Other Backward Classes.

name: National Fellowship for ST Students
description: Scholarship and fellowship support for Scheduled Tribe students pursuing higher education.

name: Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students
description: Scholarship for Scheduled Caste students studying at post-matriculation level.

name: Post Matric Scholarship for ST Students
description: Scholarship for Scheduled Tribe students studying at post-matriculation level.

name: Pre Matric Scholarship for SC Students
description: Scholarship for Scheduled Caste students studying at pre-matriculation level.

name: Pre Matric Scholarship for ST Students
description: Scholarship for Scheduled Tribe students studying at pre-matriculation level.

name: National Fellowship for Persons with Disabilities
description: Fellowship scheme for students with disabilities pursuing higher education.

name: Maulana Azad National Fellowship
description: Scholarship for students belonging to minority communities pursuing higher education.

name: National Scheme of Incentive to Girls for Secondary Education (NSIGSE)
description: Financial incentive to promote enrollment of girls in secondary education.

name: Kendriya Vidyalaya Sangathan (KVS) Initiatives
description: Central government schools providing quality education across India.

name: Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti (NVS) Scheme
description: Residential schools providing free quality education to talented rural children.

name: National Bal Bhawan Scheme
description: Promotes creative activities and learning opportunities for children.

name: National Book Trust Initiatives
description: Promotes reading culture and affordable educational books across India.

name: National Council of Educational Research and Training (NCERT) Schemes
description: Curriculum development, teacher training, and educational research initiatives.

name: National Institute of Open Schooling (NIOS)
description: Provides flexible education opportunities for school dropouts and adult learners.

name: PM Research Fellowship
description: Supports doctoral research in frontier areas of science and technology.

name: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS)
description: Encourages skill development through apprenticeship training.

name: Skill India Mission
description: Provides vocational training and skill development programs for youth.

name: PM Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
description: Flagship skill development scheme offering free training and certification.

name: National Institute Ranking Framework (NIRF)
description: Framework to rank higher education institutions in India based on performance.

name: National Mission on Education through ICT (NMEICT)
description: Promotes ICT-enabled learning and digital classrooms across India.

name: National Innovation and Start-up Policy for Students
description: Encourages innovation and entrepreneurship among students in higher education institutions.

name: National Skill Development Mission
description: Coordinates skill development initiatives across ministries and industries.

name: National Institute of Technical Teachers Training and Research (NITTTR)
description: Provides training and development programs for technical teachers.

name: National Institute of Educational Planning and Administration (NIEPA)
description: Focuses on educational planning, policy, and administration research.

name: National Mission for Teachers and Teaching (NMTT)
description: Improves teacher education and professional development programs.

name: National Programme for Mid-Day Meal in Schools
description: Provides nutritious meals to school children to enhance learning outcomes.

name: National Institute of Open Learning Initiatives
description: Supports lifelong learning opportunities through open schooling.

name: National Literacy Mission
description: Promotes adult literacy and continuing education programs.

name: National Adult Education Programme
description: Provides basic literacy and vocational training for adults.

name: National Programme for Development of Sports in Schools
description: Encourages sports and physical education in schools.

name: National ICT Award for Teachers
description: Recognizes teachers who effectively use ICT in education.

name: National Institute of Educational Technology
description: Develops educational technology tools and resources for schools.

name: National Programme for Inclusive Education
description: Supports inclusive education for children with special needs.

name: National Mission on Libraries
description: Modernizes and digitizes libraries across India for better access.

name: National Programme for Quality Education in Madrassas (NPQEM)
description: Provides modern subjects and quality education support in madrassas.

name: National Fellowship for Higher Education of ST Students
description: Supports Scheduled Tribe students pursuing MPhil and PhD programs.

name: National Fellowship for Higher Education of Minority Students
description: Scholarship support for minority students pursuing higher education.

name: National Programme for Teacher Training
description: Provides training modules and workshops for school teachers.

name: National Mission for Skill Development in Higher Education
description: Integrates skill development with higher education curricula.
